title: Luffy Drives Wapol Back
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on luffy drives wapol back, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Luffy Drives Wapol Back. Wapol loses control of the castle and the people’s fear as Luffy, Chopper, and the others push the tyrant back. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: I'm not giving up yet! I still have one other plan!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Oh... it's just a key to the armoury? shoot... I was hoping it'd be a key to his treasury instead...

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: Even the upper floors are all covered with snow!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I have to show them once and for all the true might of a king! The strength of my kingdom!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Royal Drum Crown's 7-barrel tin can King Cannon!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: I've cornered you at last! Get ready to have your ass kicked!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I should be saying that to you!

summary: This part highlights luffy drives wapol back and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
